Ma +2 sakiye sakda mero dherai sathi haru Australia lai try gare, maile ni gare. Property ko jhamela le process hault vayo. Tespachhi halka jagar lagayera soch banaye ki Nepal mai padhchu baschhu and kei business kholchhu. Ma 20 years ko thiye. Reality ma vanda imagination ma jiudai rahechhu jun kura aafulai nai thaha thiyena. Hillside tira hotel kholchhu ki euta motorcycle showeoom kholchhu, dhukka le paisa kamaihalchhu vanne aasha ra jagar thiyo. Bachelor gardai garda dherai sathi harule bich bich mai Australia gaye. Koi koi chai Japan ni gaye. Antya ma Bachelor ni sakiyo ra aafu sanga 14k ko job bahek kehi thiyena haat ma. Tesle jiwan chalne thiyena. Jiwan ko kura chhodum tyo samaye ko eklo huda ko kharcha ni tarnu garo vayo. Tespachhi aayo corona. Tyaha samma aauda situation yeti garo vaisakeko thiyo ki Nepal basera napugne Australia jana nasakne vayo. So tyo bela ali popularity gain gardai aairaheko desh Croatia ko barema sunna thale. Interesting lagyo. Kei major cvs nachahine ani dherai lagani pani nachahine vayera aafno luck yetai try gare. Ra sabai process pura garera yaha aaye. Aile 2 barsha vayo. Suru ma aauda eklai thiyo company ma. Nyasro lagthyo. Ek barsha jasto vayepachhi company le ajhai Nepali haru lyaune vane pachhi maile aafno aafanta ra chineko sathiharulai kaam offer gare. Aile 4 jana plus 2 jana feri aaudai chhan. Kamai dherai chhaina tara company le sabai subidha diyera 1 lakh jati kamai hunchha. Aafno sathi bhai ra kei aafanta haru ni sangai chhan. Dherai high profile nahola tara Croatia ko salary le mero ghar ko pariwar haru aananda le khusi sanga basna pako chha. Malai future ko chinta chhaina. So ma kina Nepal farkine? And now many skilled people are leaving the country. Not because of unemployment, but they are looking for a better life style and salary. But tei kaam for instance Australia ma garda you get paid really well. So it’s a no brainer to leave the country. And this is a serious issue for Nepal.
